'''鈭歴h-w-l-y''' ('''kashawleyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flashback|flashback]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flashback|flashback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-w-l-y
|-
! Lemma
| kashawleyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishawleyoko|thishawleyoko]] || [[word:jishawleyoko|jishawleyoko]] || [[word:shishawleyoko|shishawleyoko]] || [[word:kishawleyoko|kishawleyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushawleyoko|thuthushawleyoko]] || [[word:jujushawleyoko|jujushawleyoko]] || [[word:shushushawleyoko|shushushawleyoko]] || [[word:kukushawleyoko|kukushawleyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushawleyoko|thushawleyoko]] || [[word:jushawleyoko|jushawleyoko]] || [[word:shushawleyoko|shushawleyoko]] || [[word:kushawleyoko|kushawleyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshawleyoko|thoshawleyoko]] || [[word:joshawleyoko|joshawleyoko]] || [[word:shoshawleyoko|shoshawleyoko]] || [[word:koshawleyoko|koshawleyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shawleyoko|th忙shawleyoko]] || [[word:j忙shawleyoko|j忙shawleyoko]] || [[word:sh忙shawleyoko|sh忙shawleyoko]] || [[word:k忙shawleyoko|k忙shawleyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
